commits.subject: Merge pull request #15 from devmade-ai/claude/code-review-audit-JlaCw
commits.body: Audit fixes: type safety, stale request guards, and hydration ordering
commits.title: Merge pull request #15 from devmade-ai/claude/code-review-audit-JlaCw

commits.subject: fix(audit): address code review findings across hooks, components, and lib
commits.body:
Race conditions:
- useStations: request ID guard discards stale responses from rapid filter changes
- usePersistedState: expose `loaded` flag, add mountedRef to prevent overwriting
  user selections during AsyncStorage hydration
- Home screen: defer first search until persisted preferences are loaded

Type safety:
- useStations: add isValidResult runtime check on RPC response rows
- station/[id]: typed FuelPriceRow interface replaces scattered `as` casts
- PriceEditor: typed CurrentPriceRow with defensive typeof checks

Memory safety:
- useLocation: mountedRef guards setState after unmount during GPS await
- FuelMapWeb: ref-based click handler prevents stale closure in map.on('click')

Cleanup:
- Remove unused `centered` and `loadingText` styles from home screen
- Remove stale `modal.tsx` reference from CLAUDE.md architecture
- Route console.error through debugAdd in supabase.ts and mapbox.ts
- Consolidate MAPBOX_TOKEN imports (FuelMapWeb, LocationSearch) to shared module
- PriceEditor wrapped in React.memo to avoid re-renders from parent form state

UI fixes:
- station/[id]: track coordinate validity via explicit flag instead of === 0 check
- station/[id]: fix trailing comma when city is empty

Tags: code-quality, type-safety, race-condition, cleanup, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-audit
Semver: patch

commits.title: address code review findings across hooks, components, and lib

commits.subject: feat(pwa): add service worker, install prompt, update detection + fix timer leaks
commits.body:
PWA system from CLAUDE.md Suggested Implementations, adapted for Expo Web:
- Service worker (public/sw.js): cache-first for static assets, network-first
  for Supabase API, stale-while-revalidate for navigation. Version-based cache.
- usePWAUpdate hook: registers SW, polls for updates every 60min, exposes
  hasUpdate boolean and updateApp() to activate waiting SW.
- usePWAInstall hook: detects browser type (Chromium/Safari/Firefox), captures
  beforeinstallprompt event, persists dismiss state. Includes race condition
  fix via early-capture inline script in +html.tsx.
- InstallPrompt banner: bottom banner with "Install" (Chromium native) or
  "How to Install" (Safari/Firefox manual instructions).
- InstallInstructionsModal: browser-specific step-by-step guides (Safari iOS,
  Safari macOS, Firefox Android, Firefox desktop).
- UpdatePrompt banner: teal bar at top when new SW version is waiting.
- manifest.json background_color updated to dark theme (#111827).

Timer leak fixes (from CLAUDE.md Suggested Implementations):
- BurgerMenu: track handleItem setTimeout in ref, cleanup on unmount
- DebugPill: cleanup auto-scroll timeout in useEffect return
- DebugPill: track copy feedback timeout in ref, cleanup on unmount

Tags: pwa, service-worker, install-prompt, timer-cleanup, web
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: minor

commits.title: add service worker, install prompt, update detection + fix timer leaks

commits.subject: feat(debug): add DebugPill diagnostic overlay with circular buffer log
commits.body:
Alpha-phase diagnostic tool for inspecting app behavior on shared/mobile
devices where console access is unavailable.

Components:
- debugLog.ts: In-memory pub/sub circular buffer (200 entries max).
  Sources: boot, supabase, location, map, navigation, render, global.
  Severities: info, success, warn, error. Global error handlers capture
  unhandled errors/rejections at module load.
- DebugPill.tsx: Floating pill in bottom-right corner. Collapsed shows
  "dbg" with entry count + error/warn dot badges. Expanded shows two
  tabs (Log with color-coded entries, Env with runtime diagnostics).
  Copy generates full debug report to clipboard, Clear wipes entries.

Wired up debug logging in:
- useStations: station search success/failure
- useLocation: GPS permission, acquisition, failure
- useFuelTypes: fuel types fetch success/failure
- FuelMapWeb: map init success/failure

Intended for removal post-alpha.

Tags: debug, diagnostics, alpha, overlay
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: added
Epic: debug-tooling
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QL2sTVHifGeTbV29qusQbE
commits.title: add DebugPill diagnostic overlay with circular buffer log

commits.subject: refactor(theme): implement proper light/dark mode, remove all hardcoded colors
commits.body:
Replace ~55 hardcoded color values across 19 files with theme-derived tokens.
Ensures consistent appearance in both light and dark modes with proper contrast.

Key changes:
- Fix Themed.tsx: was hardcoded to light-only, now uses useColorScheme
- Remove static Theme export from Colors.ts (was always DarkTheme)
- Root layout now references LightTheme/DarkTheme constants
- +html.tsx CSS uses theme constants via template interpolation
- All #FFFFFF on brand backgrounds → textOnPrimary token
- FuelMapWeb: map style reactive to system color scheme (dark-v11/light-v11)
- MapErrorBoundary: class component uses Appearance API for theme detection
- Toast: uses AppColors.price.fresh/LightTheme.error instead of raw hex
- Switch track color uses t.border instead of hardcoded #D1D5DB
- All components use useAppTheme() hook for dynamic color values

Remaining #000 values are shadowColor — standard for both modes.

Tags: theme, dark-mode, light-mode, colors, accessibility, contrast
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: minor

commits.subject: feat(ux): comprehensive UX improvements across all screens
commits.body:
Changes across 17 improvement areas:

General UX:
- Toast feedback system for admin save/toggle actions
- Better empty states with actionable suggestions (widen radius, reset filters)
- "Reset filters" button to clear all filters in one tap
- Address search input using Mapbox Geocoding API
- Warning icon + dimmed opacity for stale prices (> 7 days)
- Persisted fuel type and radius preferences via AsyncStorage

Mobile UX:
- Haptic feedback (expo-haptics) on all interactive elements
- Pull-to-refresh on station detail via RefreshControl
- SafeAreaView on all screens (admin, detail, home)
- KeyboardAvoidingView on admin edit form
- Dark mode: full light/dark theme with system detection
- StatusBar controlled per color scheme

Web on Mobile:
- Dynamic viewport height (dvh) for mobile browser toolbar handling
- touch-action: manipulation on map to prevent browser zoom conflicts
- Web inputs styled with font-size 16px (prevents iOS auto-zoom)
- PWA manifest for "Add to Home Screen" support
- GeoJSON source + circle/symbol layers replace HTML markers for performance

Tags: ux, dark-mode, haptics, persistence, pwa, map-performance, accessibility
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-improvements

commits.subject: fix(app): comprehensive bug fixes, UX, accessibility, and code quality improvements
commits.body:
Fix 9 bugs: web Alert.alert no-op (admin flows broken), search errors
not shown, date timezone off-by-one, stations flash empty on search,
Android nav crash without Google Maps, module-level throws crashing app,
station detail nav to 0,0, web marker cleanup leak, map WebGL crash.

Improve UX: map fills available space (flex instead of fixed 300px),
touch targets meet 44px minimum, radius selector scrolls on narrow
screens, search debounced (300ms), retry buttons on all error screens,
fuel type loading state shown.

Add accessibility: roles/states/labels on all interactive elements,
text staleness labels alongside color dots, aria-labels on web markers.

Improve performance: StationCard React.memo, memoized cheapest price
calculations, memoized admin filtered list.

Improve code quality: Theme tokens replace hardcoded hex colors, removed
dead code (SpaceMono font, TabBarIcon, FUEL_CATEGORIES, dark theme,
tintColorDark), standardized error handling with actual error messages.

New files: src/lib/alert.ts (cross-platform alerts),
src/components/map/MapErrorBoundary.tsx (graceful map failures).

Tags: bugfix, ux, accessibility, performance, code-quality, web
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-fixes
Semver: patch

commits.subject: fix(core): resolve 8 runtime and quality issues from code review
commits.body:
- Fix station detail coordinate extraction: parse PostGIS GeoJSON
  instead of accessing non-existent .latitude/.longitude properties
  (was sending users to 0,0 for directions)
- Fix fuel type names: query fuel_prices table (has FK for PostgREST
  join) instead of current_prices materialized view (no FK, join
  silently fails, shows "Unknown" for all fuel types)
- Fix Mapbox token init: FuelMap and StationMarker now import from
  lib/mapbox init module instead of @rnmapbox/maps directly, ensuring
  setAccessToken is called before map renders
- Fix map/list toggle: make views mutually exclusive (list was always
  visible regardless of toggle state)
- Add admin auth warning banner: persistent banner in admin layout
  warns that edits may fail without a valid admin session
- Add updated_at trigger: new migration auto-sets stations.updated_at
  on row update, removing fragile client-side timestamp setting
- Remove dead dark mode branching: root layout hardcodes DefaultTheme
  since all components use light-only styles
- Fix inconsistent imports: standardize to relative paths (was mixing
  @/ alias with ../../ relative paths)

Tags: bugfix, code-review, database, mapbox, admin, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review
Semver: patch

toggle → station cards sorted by distance or cheapest price.

distances, dates, staleness).

commits.subject: docs(all): add project-specific sections to CLAUDE.md, update session docs
commits.body:
CLAUDE.md now includes project-specific context alongside the shared glow-props
rules: Project Status, Architecture (full file tree), Key State Structures
(SearchParams, RadiusSearchResult, StationWithPrices), and updated AI Notes
with project-relevant items replacing glow-props-specific ones (TutorialModal,
Vite references removed).

commits.subject: feat(init): scaffold Expo project with Supabase schema and geospatial queries
commits.body:
Project initialization for the fuel station finder app:
- Expo SDK 54 with TypeScript, file-based routing (expo-router), tabs template
- Supabase schema: fuel_types, stations (PostGIS), fuel_prices, price_history
- Materialized view (current_prices) with auto-refresh trigger
- RLS policies: public read for active data, admin full access via JWT role
- find_stations_in_radius() PostgreSQL function for geospatial radius search
- Seed data: 6 SA fuel types, 12 Gauteng stations with sample prices
- Supabase client (src/lib/supabase.ts) and app-level TypeScript types
- Route stubs for station detail and admin views
- .env.example with required env var names

Docker daemon unavailable in this environment so migrations are untested
against a live database — SQL follows the spec exactly and is ready to run
via `supabase start` or against a remote Supabase project.

Tags: expo, supabase, postgis, schema, init
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: fuel-station-finder
Semver: minor
